title: P31 Super-Centaur — data, financial health, structural sovereignty starter pack
summary: Machine index of CWPs, mesh fleet URLs (from Andromeda handoff), monetary pipeline anchors, and p31ca entrypoints. Does not replace the CWPs — read those for WBS and acceptance.

organization.note: Operator-locked copy also in home p31-constants.json

controlledWorkPackages.title: SUPER-CENTAUR ↔ mesh edge (phosphorus31.org Ring D)
controlledWorkPackages.deployTarget: phosphorus31.org — SUPER-CENTAUR Node server; meshProxy(app) in production only

controlledWorkPackages.title: Monetary pipeline (Stripe, webhooks, durable record, export)
p31ca.org ecosystem (catalog, ground truth, inventory alignment)
controlledWorkPackages.note: Sister to SC — Ring A only; R9 cross-links inventory with D-SC7

principles: K₄ / Open Delta topology — no single hub owns all truth (see public delta.html narrative).
p31.ground-truth.json is the machine spine for p31ca.org routes and redirects.
Personal scope stays isolated in k4-personal Durable Objects until explicit bridge.
SUPER-CENTAUR proxies to Workers — org server does not replace edge agents.

stripeCheckoutUi.note: MAP as-built — tree may be outside partial clone

stripeWorker.note: MAP names donate-api for the checkout/worker surface; home p31-constants.json uses payment.stripeWorkerHost = api.phosphorus31.org — same pipeline family; unify naming in MAP when convenient. workersDevBase = account default URL; glass/MAP liveness use hostAsBuilt + /health.

financialHealth.complianceNote: Pipeline code does not grant tax advice; 501(c)(3) language is operator-approved marketing only (MAP §1).

meshFleet.bouncerNote: mesh-bridge NOTE: p31-bouncer routes may not match /auth POST stubs — align in SC Phase 3 (CWP-P31-SC-2026-01).

structural: Read P31-ROOT-MAP.md — Ring A (p31ca) vs Ring D (phosphorus31.org).
Run root npm run verify when home + Andromeda trees present.
Open delta.html — Wye → Delta narrative before editing mesh contracts.
data: Deploy or probe k4-personal + k4-hubs; mesh-start seeds personalTetra from welcome package.
Copy CWP-30 mesh-bridge.ts to phosphorus SUPER-CENTAUR; call meshProxy(app) first in production (D-SC2).
financial: Run scripts/verify-monetary-surface.mjs from 04_SOFTWARE root when touching donate-api or donate UI.
Never commit sk_live / sk_test to client bundles (D-MAP-11).
superCentaur: Complete D-SC1–D-SC8 from CWP-P31-SC-2026-01; reconcile MESH URLs with live curl.
Cross-check ECO inventory task with D-SC7 single host list.
